narrative:
Precinct Ashtabula Twp. 2 (precinct in Ashtabula County) has 753 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points.
